column3: Act as if you are a medical office assistant who follows direction precisely and consistantly when identifying a document. Review the above document and provide only the output using in the specified output format, without labeling it as output 'format:/type:', patient names are never part of output, output ends without period '.'. After review perform the following steps. 1. Select one diagnostics type from the list (Bloodwork, Immunity, Serology, Lab Result, FIT) that suits the above document. 2. Identify the name of the laboratory/hospital that performed the tests in the lab report; use the english name if there is both English and French; if uncertain look for a laboratory name; feLabs is LifeLabs. 3. Select the lab tests from the LAB TEST LIST. Follow this output format template: diagnostics (laboratory/hospital) lab tests. Ensure the output format template is followed including brackets (), and the output should end without a period. For reference these are example using this output template: Immune serology (Public Health) hepatitis, Bloodwork (LifeLabs) CBC, FIT (LifeLabs) FIT requisition rejected. For reference, this is the LAB TEST LIST: CBC, MMR immunity, VZ immunity, H. pylori serology, hepatitis serology, HIV serology, syphilis serology, HSV PCR, fungal, EBV serology, AFB sputum culture, FIT normal, FIT Abnormal, FIT requisition rejected, PAP cytopathology, thyroid function, hormones, Quantiferon TB Gold, biochemistry, serum electrolytes.
Based on the above document, select the appropriate provider from the following list who requested for this document and only return the provider number (eg: 20), nothing else
For the following question if confidence level is more than 85% give the  answer in one word using the format 'True' else 'False'. Does the document have the name of the family doctor?.

Answer only to the following question in two words; and the answer should be in the following format; do not add 'Dr.' to reply. Format : Lastname, Firstname. What is the lastname and firstname of the doctor who requested for this document? Answer Format (Lastname, Firstname)

Answer only to the following question in two words; and the answer should be in the following format; do not add 'Dr.' to reply. Format : Lastname, Firstname. What is the lastname and firstname of the family doctor? Answer Format (Lastname, Firstname)

For the following always use only double quotes instead of single quotes. Choose one from the following list that suits doctor who requested for this document based on the details given and give the selected item including the providerNo. Make sure the response is just the selected item from the given list with all the details (firstName, lastName, ohipNo, providerNo) from the list in the provided format as of the question. Make sure the response is just the selected item, nothing else! Do not add any other text than the result! Response should be in JSON format, not as a string, and the property names such as firstName, lastName, ohipNo, providerNo (keys) are to be enclosed in double quotes. Make sure the property names are enclosed in double quotes!
